user_message: set the policy dropdown to DROP on the ER605 ACL form
reasoning: Network hardware UI interaction is infrastructure work. The ER605 uses custom combobox elements — #policy is a hidden input, not a standard select. It requires DOM traversal: parentElement → combobox-container → combobox-switch click → label click.

This is a DOM structure debugging issue on network hardware. The selector is wrong because #policy is an INPUT.hidden.combobox-value, not a container element. The display area is a sibling, not a child. Must traverse via parentElement.

user_message: click a combobox option in a web UI where standard select doesn't work
reasoning: Custom combobox interaction requires understanding non-standard DOM patterns. Pattern: find the hidden input → get parentElement (container) → click .combobox-switch to open dropdown → click label.combobox-label that wraps the target input[value].

user_message: fill out a multi-field form in the ER605 management UI
reasoning: Setting multiple combobox fields sequentially on network hardware UI. Each field uses the same pattern: open dropdown → click target label. Fields must be set one at a time with verification between each.

user_message: submit a form and verify the new entry appears in the table
reasoning: Form submission and table verification on hardware management UI. After clicking submit, read the table to confirm the new row with correct field values. Use DOM evaluation to extract table cell content.

user_message: the browser evaluate endpoint returns 500 when I send complex JavaScript
reasoning: HTTP API error from browser automation worker. Complex JS with mixed quotes fails when shell-escaped via curl. Solution: use Python requests.post() with json= parameter for proper escaping instead of curl with inline JS.

user_message: navigate to Firewall > Access Control on the ER605 web UI
reasoning: Web UI navigation on network hardware. Use the browser automation API to click menu items. Important: never use /navigate endpoint (resets cookies/session). Instead, click through the menu hierarchy.

user_message: a form field requires underscores instead of hyphens
reasoning: Hardware UI validation constraint. ER605 ACL rule names accept underscores but reject hyphens. This is a hardware-specific validation rule, not a general coding issue.

user_message: take a screenshot of the current browser state to debug a UI issue
reasoning: Visual debugging of hardware management UI via browser automation. Use the screenshot endpoint on the browser-worker pod to capture current state for inspection.

user_message: the time field on the ACL form isn't set and validation fails
reasoning: ER605 ACL form requires ALL fields set including time='Any'. Missing fields cause silent validation failure. The time dropdown defaults to empty, not 'Any' — must be explicitly set.
